case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$16,696.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO LYDIA GEORGE ONLY FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA GEORGE, LYDIA

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$16,696.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100,INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO KISHA CLARKE ONLY FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA CLARKE, KISHA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $10,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY MICHAEL GAINES ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT KISHA CLARKE. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $4,000.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
